description: Lowest 5 scalar Helmholtz eigenvalues of the unit cube with homogeneous Dirichlet BC, assembled by the ONNX static-graph pipeline (Epic #88 Phase F.2 / issue #123) on the programmatic cube_tet_mesh of n=10 (729 interior DOFs). Same mesh and same scipy.sparse.linalg.eigsh seam as the NumPy canonical baseline.json; ONNX provides the cross-IR row alongside JAX and TF-Java for Epic #88's graph-only constraint check.

n.description: Cells per side of the programmatic cube_tet_mesh.

eigenvalues.description: Lowest 5 eigenvalues, ascending. Cross-language f64 reproducibility allows ~1e-5 relative drift per Epic #88 framing; this fixture uses 1e-8 absolute since the in-tree NumPy and ONNX values agree to ~1e-13 at fixture-gen time.

provenance.verified_against: reference/numpy/cube_cavity_minimal.py -- eigenvalues agree to 1.3e-15 relative at fixture-gen time
